key_facts: Founded circa 2016–2018 ('7+ years' clean energy digitalization company as of 2025)
500+ enterprise customers including TCL PV, Huarun Finance Leasing, State Power Investment Group, Huaneng
SaaS platform covering full PV project lifecycle: registration → O&M
Also serves EVTEC energy storage clients
Platform spans: monitoring, work-order management, revenue tracking
Operates on marketplace/O&M boundary — aggregates solar service buyers and providers
business_model_notes: B2B SaaS for solar asset management. Target customers: financial leasing companies (Huarun), utilities (Huaneng, SPIC), corporate solar owners (TCL). Revenue: SaaS subscription license + customization fees. Positioned as the 'enterprise solar ERP' — bringing enterprise software management discipline to solar project portfolios. The TCL relationship (500 MW, 50+ projects) validates the platform for managing large distributed portfolios.
competitive_position: Mid-tier B2B SaaS competitor in solar O&M management software space. Competes with Guoneng Rixin (301162.SZ, publicly listed, more advanced AI forecasting) and Getech-PVOM (TCL-incubated, also serves TCL portfolio). The overlap with Getech for TCL clients is notable and may indicate JninengCloud is the older/more basic tool being displaced.
research_notes: Medium confidence. Data from tech.china.com article (Nov 2025) and company website. No funding disclosed — may be bootstrapped or PE-backed without public disclosure. The TCL relationship is key anchor customer reference but limited independent data on market position vs Guoneng Rixin.
